title: Merch Evangelion Merchandise 2 or Why Do I Keep Buying Things
display_title: Merch Evangelion Merchandise 2 or Why Do I Keep Buying Things
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Evangelion Merchandise 2, or, Why Do I Keep Buying Things!?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 08, 2014 6:20 am Continued from the Gainax Cash Cow thread : So, you want to impress your girlfriend with a necklace? Well, why on Earth would you wanna do that when you can just get a DSS Choker for yourself instead? It blends especially well when worn with any standard Japanese school uniform. It can also hide nicely under your plug suit. (If you know what I mean. Amiright? It’s sure to make your partner’s head spin!)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu May 08, 2014 6:33 am Oh god that's of such bad taste I can't even... Except for cosplay I just can't see any occasion to wear that thing, not only for what it represent in the movie, but also because that device is not very beautiful, besides even the product above isn't very good : looks more like a dog collar to which they glued two cheap red plastic rectangles, which is probably exactly what they did. And they sell that 44$! That's ten dollars more than the 3.0 Groundwork that's infinitely more interesting!

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu May 08, 2014 8:13 am Chokers are not, that is not.

[]: Re: Eva Merchandise 2, or, Why Do I Keep Buying Things!?             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu May 08, 2014 8:26 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: So, you want to impress your girlfriend with a necklace?

[]: Re: Eva Merchandise 2, or, Why Do I Keep Buying Things!?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 08, 2014 12:49 pm Fireball wrote: You mean boyfriend

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu May 08, 2014 1:07 pm I might buy it if it looked better. That one doesn't appeal to me at all.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu May 08, 2014 2:55 pm Wondering why a black metal with some lining to prevent chafing wasn't used. There were replica Battle Royal collars I remember from 10 years ago that used metal.

[]: Re: Eva Merchandise 2, or, Why Do I Keep Buying Things!?             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu May 08, 2014 4:25 pm Fireball wrote: You mean boyfriend

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu May 08, 2014 5:06 pm That depends entirely on how well you can play the piano.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat May 10, 2014 5:08 pm that is so cheap and tacky… even for my taste

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat May 10, 2014 11:33 pm A Unit 01 wristwatch is being released (ANN link here ). The problem is that it's almost $2500. It look pretty damn nice too.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat May 10, 2014 11:41 pm cyharding wrote: A Unit 01 wristwatch is being released (ANN link here ). The problem is that it's almost $2500. It look pretty damn nice too.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 11, 2014 12:15 am Wait, there are Eva fans out there that can blow this kind of $$$$ on a watch? I want to be one of them. Honestly though, I first saw this watch on Instagram and that watch face did not strike me at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun May 11, 2014 2:08 am I don't have that kind of money, and if I did, I wouldn't spend it on a watch. And particularly not that watch. However, I'm sure there's somebody out there that'll like it. Just 'cause I don't find it appealing doesn't mean it ain't good.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun May 11, 2014 10:09 am If I had that kind of money to put towards a watch, I'd want something legitimate, like an Omega Speedmaster, a Cartier Tank, or a Rolex Submariner.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 11, 2014 12:16 pm Whenever something high end or pricey like this comes up the consideration is blow all that money on one item or spread it out over multiple, like 10 RAHs.

[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Mon May 19, 2014 9:46 pm Bought a bunch of Eva crap from ACen. Most of it's NTE stuff, but still pretty happy with it. The three guests that visit my apartment a year will know of my true Eva love. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 20, 2014 2:50 am Joy Evangelion wrote: Sakura, Maya, Shinji. Really like these three, although Shinji's face doesn't look like Shinji's face. The Sakura figure looks great.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue May 20, 2014 10:24 am Looks like it to me. That scene really helped to make the character a little more 3D (well, at least for that particular episode.)

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Tue May 20, 2014 10:26 am Shinji is staring at Maya's ass
